Rights.Note: CC0 1.0 Universal is the Creative Commons license applicable to all publicly available SPASE metadata descriptions

ResourceHeader.ResourceName: IBEX High Energy Neutral Atom Imager (Hi) Data Release 07, Compton-Getting corrected, not Survival Probability corrected, Omnidirectional, Mono Inertial Frame, Level H3 (H3), 1-to-10-map average Data

RevisionEvent.Note: Initial release of metadata, ADAPT generated, LFB
Curated and validated against SPASE 2.7.1, OK

ResourceHeader.Description: The Interstellar Boundary Explorer (IBEX) has operated in space since 2008, improving understanding of the outer heliosphere and its interaction with the local interstellar medium. This data set is from Release 7 1-to-10-map-average IBEX-Hi map data for the years 2009-2014. It contains omnidirectional energetic neutral atom (hydrogen) flux maps in the Mono Inertial Frame between 1 and 100 AU, with Compton-Getting correction applied to the flux spectra and no survival-probability correction applied. The data consist of all-sky maps in solar ecliptic longitude and latitude for IBEX-Hi energy channels 2-6. Energy-channel FWHM ranges are 0.52-0.95, 0.84-1.55, 1.36-2.50, 1.99-3.75, and 3.13-6.00 keV, with center-point energies of 0.71, 1.11, 1.74, 2.73, and 4.29 keV, respectively. The CDAWeb ProductKey is IBEX_H3_ENA_HI_R07_CG_NOSP_OMNI_MIF_10MP.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge the IBEX Mission Principal Investigator, Dr. David J McComas of Princeton University. The IBEX Release 7 data are archived as fully citable data. Please consult IBEX team publications and personnel for further details on production, processing, and usage of these data.

InformationURL.Name: IBEX The Interstellar Boundary Explorer mission
InformationURL.Description: IBEX Mission, Instrument, and Data Release Descriptions

InformationURL.Name: IBEX Data Release 7
InformationURL.Description: IBEX Data Release-7, IBEX-Hi 10 map average maps in ascii list and image formats

Rights.Note: CC0 1.0 Universal is the Creative Commons license applicable to all publicly available NASA Heliophysics data products

AccessURL.Name: FTPS from SPDF (not with most browsers)
AccessURL.Description: Access to Data in CDF Format via ftps from SPDF

AccessURL.Name: HTTPS from SPDF
AccessURL.Description: Access to Data in CDF Format via https from SPDF

AccessURL.Name: CDAWeb
AccessURL.Description: Access to ASCII, CDF, and Plots via NASA/GSFC CDAWeb

AccessInformation.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge the Principal Investigator D.J. McComas. Please acknowledge the Data Providers and CDAWeb when using these Data.

Rights.Note: CC0 1.0 Universal is the Creative Commons license applicable to all publicly available NASA Heliophysics data products

AccessURL.Name: CDAWeb HAPI Server
AccessURL.Description: Web Service to this product using the HAPI interface.

AccessInformation.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge the Principal Investigator D.J. McComas. Please acknowledge the Data Providers and CDAWeb when using these Data.

NumericalData.Caveats: These Release 7 Mono Inertial Frame map-average products are distinct from the standard six-month, one-year, and multi-year Release 7 map products that do not carry an explicit frame segment in the ResourceID. The ResourceID therefore includes MIF to avoid ambiguity with other inertial-frame or spacecraft-frame products.

Parameter.Name: Epoch Start Time
Parameter.Description: CDF epoch time for the start of the map-average measurement period.

Parameter.Name: Epoch Stop Time
Parameter.Description: CDF epoch time for the end of the map-average measurement period.

Parameter.Name: Map Number
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Sequential map number for the IBEX Release 7 map interval.

Parameter.Name: Solar Ecliptic Latitude Bin Number
Parameter.Description: Solar Ecliptic Latitude Bin Number corresponding to six-degree latitudinal increments of the current IBEX-HI viewing sector

Parameter.Name: Solar West Ecliptic Longitude Bin Number
Parameter.Description: Solar West Ecliptic Longitude Bin Number corresponding to six-degree longitudinal increments of the current IBEX-HI viewing sector

Parameter.Name: Solar Ecliptic Latitude
Parameter.Description: Solar Ecliptic Latitude

Parameter.Name: Solar West Ecliptic Longitude
Parameter.Description: Solar West Ecliptic Longitude

Parameter.Name: Solar East Ecliptic Longitude
Parameter.Description: Solar East Ecliptic Longitude

Parameter.Name: Starting Orbit Number
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Starting Orbit Number of the measurement period

Parameter.Name: Ending Orbit Number
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Ending Orbit Number of the measurement period

Parameter.Name: Differential Flux, Hi Energy Channel 2 ~0.71 keV
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Differential ENA flux for IBEX-Hi energy channel 2, midpoint approximately 0.71 keV (0.52-0.95 keV), mapped image.

Parameter.Name: Differential Flux, Hi Energy Channel 2 ~0.71 keV
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Differential ENA flux for IBEX-Hi energy channel 2, midpoint approximately 0.71 keV (0.52-0.95 keV), X-Y image.

Parameter.Name: Signal/Noise Ratio, Hi Energy Channel 2 ~0.71 keV
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Signal-to-noise ratio for IBEX-Hi energy channel 2, midpoint approximately 0.71 keV (0.52-0.95 keV), mapped image.

Parameter.Name: Signal/Noise Ratio, Hi Energy Channel 2 ~0.71 keV
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Signal-to-noise ratio for IBEX-Hi energy channel 2, midpoint approximately 0.71 keV (0.52-0.95 keV), X-Y image.

Parameter.Name: Flux Variance, Hi Energy Channel 2 ~0.71 keV
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Variance of ENA flux for IBEX-Hi energy channel 2, midpoint approximately 0.71 keV (0.52-0.95 keV), mapped image.

Parameter.Name: Flux Variance, Hi Energy Channel 2 ~0.71 keV
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Variance of ENA flux for IBEX-Hi energy channel 2, midpoint approximately 0.71 keV (0.52-0.95 keV), X-Y image.
